message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
skinparam backgroundColor white
skinparam sequence {
  ArrowColor #000000
  LifeLineBorderColor #999999
  LifeLineBackgroundColor #FFFFFF
  ParticipantBorderColor #999999
  ParticipantBackgroundColor #E9E9F2
  BoxBorderColor #999999
  BoxBackgroundColor #FFFFFF
  GroupBorderColor #000000
  GroupBackgroundColor #FFFFFF
  NoteBackgroundColor #FFF9C4
  NoteBorderColor #999999
}
hide footbox

actor CenterCoordinator

participant ":DataFromLegacySystemUI" as UI
participant ":DataFromLegacySystemController()" as C1
participant ":DataFromLegacySystemController" as C2
participant ":ReadLegacyDataFile" as R
participant ":Company" as Company
participant ":SNSUserStore" as SNS
participant ":App" as App
participant ":VaccinationCenter" as VC
participant ":Arrival" as Arrival
participant ":Departure" as Departure
participant ":vaccinationCentersStore" as VCS

CenterCoordinator -> UI : 1 Asks to load a CSV file with legacy data.
UI -> C1 : 2 DataFromLegacySystemController()
C1 -> C2 : 2 DataFromLegacySystemController

C2 -> Company : 3 getVaccinationCentersStore()
Company --> C2 : 4 returns the store
C2 -> VCS : 5 getVaccinationCenterAssociatedToCoordinator(id)
VCS --> C2 : 6 returns the vaccination center
C2 -> R : 7 ReadLegacyDataFile(center)

UI -> CenterCoordinator : 8 request path of the CSV file
CenterCoordinator -> UI : 9 types path
UI -> C2 : 10 readFile(path)
C2 -> R : 11 readFile(String path)

loop while csv has new lines
  R -> R : 12 validateFile(legacySNSUserNumber,\nfirstDate,secondDate,thirdDate,fourthDate)
  R -> R : 13 Saves data into an ArrayList<String> called\nlegacyDataList
end

R -> Company : 14 getSNSUserList()
Company -> SNS : 15 getSNSUserList()
SNS --> Company : 16 returns list
Company --> R : 17 returns list

R -> Company : 18 getVaccineList()
Company --> R : 19 returns list

loop while legacyDataList has new lines
  R -> R : 20 findPosOfSNSUser(snsUsersList,\nvalues,positionInSNSUserList)
  R -> R : 21 findPosOfVax(vaccineList,values,positionInVaccinesList)
  R -> R : 22 checksDuplicates(updatedList,snsUsersList,vaccineList,positionInSNSUserList,positionInVaccinesList,lineOfTheData)
  R -> R : 23 Saves data into an ArrayList<String> called updatedList

  R -> App : 24 createArrival()
  App -> Arrival : 25 createArrival()
  Arrival --> App : 26 returns Arrival
  App -> App : 27 Saves arrival into List<Arrival> called arrivalsList
  App -> App : 28 genericsArrivals.binaryFileWrite(Constants.FILE_PATH_ARRIVALS, arrivalsList)

  R -> App : 29 createDeparture()
  App -> Departure : 30 createDeparture()
  Departure --> App : 31 returns departure
  App -> App : 32 Saves departure into List<Departure> called departuresList
  App -> App : 33 genericsDeparture.binaryFileWrite(Constants.FILE_PATH_DEPARTURES, departuresList)
end

R --> C2 : 34 returns updatedList
C2 --> UI : 35 returns updatedList

UI -> CenterCoordinator : 36 requests the option to sort
CenterCoordinator -> UI : 37 selects option
UI -> C2 : 38 chooseCriteriaToSort(option)
C2 -> R : 39 setList(option)

loop while updatedList has new lines
  R -> R : 40 Saves dates to\n a List<LocalDateTime>\n called listToSort
end

UI -> CenterCoordinator : 41 requests the order of the sort
CenterCoordinator -> UI : 42 selects order

alt (algorithmToBeUsed == "InsertionSort", option == "0" - Ascending)
  UI -> C2 : 43 getAlgorithm()
  C2 -> Company : 44 getSortingAlgorithm()
  Company --> C2 : 45 returns algorithm
  C2 --> UI : 46 returns algorithm

  UI -> R : 47 sortListWithAlgo(algorithmToBeUsed,option)
  note right of R
    algorithmToBeUsed can be InsertionSort or HeapSort, both have methods that
    can sort in ascending/descending order, here we are just representing the
    InsertionSort algorithm because HeapSort functions in a similar way.
  end note
  R -> R : 48 insertionSortAscending()
  R --> UI : 49 returns sortedList
  UI --> CenterCoordinator : 51 prints sortedList
else (algorithmToBeUsed == "InsertionSort", option == "1" - Descending)
  UI -> C2 : 53 getAlgorithm()
  C2 -> Company : 54 getSortingAlgorithm()
  Company --> C2 : 55 returns algorithm
  C2 --> UI : 56 returns algorithm

  UI -> R : 57 sortListWithAlgo(algorithmToBeUsed,option)
  R -> R : 58 insertionSortDescending()
  R --> UI : 59 returns sortedList
  UI --> CenterCoordinator : 61 prints sortedList
end

@enduml
```
